title: leucas menthifolia var. menthifolia
intro: Leucas menthifolia var. menthifolia is a plant species belonging to the family Lamiaceae, commonly known as a fragrant mint bush or leucas. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Leucas menthifolia var. menthifolia include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as coughs and colds. Leucas menthifolia var. menthifolia can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, and is also used in traditional Ayurvedic medicine as a treatment for various ailments.
